title: Rails Segment 09
summary: A segment of Ruby on Rails framework development covering 143 PRs across 7 dependency layers. This segment includes Active Record connection adapter improvements (PostgreSQL, SQLite3, MySQL), Action Text markdown conversion feature (a significant new capability), Active Support caching and encryption enhancements, Action Pack controller and dispatch improvements, Active Model validation refinements, Railties generator and configuration updates, and various cross-cutting quality-of-life improvements across the framework.
instructionPreview: `/workspace/requirements/` contains every requirement as a separate file. Each file describes one change request. Read them all, implement every one. Order does not matter, but some changes depend on others.
instruction:
You are an autonomous engineer. The repository at /workspace is at an earlier state of a real-world project.

`/workspace/requirements/` contains every requirement as a separate file. Each file describes one change request. Read them all, implement every one. Order does not matter, but some changes depend on others.

moduleDag.description: A segment of Ruby on Rails framework development covering 143 PRs across 7 dependency layers. This segment includes Active Record connection adapter improvements (PostgreSQL, SQLite3, MySQL), Action Text markdown conversion feature (a significant new capability), Active Support caching and encryption enhancements, Action Pack controller and dispatch improvements, Active Model validation refinements, Railties generator and configuration updates, and various cross-cutting quality-of-life improvements across the framework.

nodes.label: Active Record Core
nodes.description: Core Active Record ORM functionality including model schema, associations, reflections, counter cache, insert_all, query interface, and base model behavior. Touched by 24 PRs covering schema improvements, migration helpers, and core ORM features.

nodes.label: AR Abstract Adapter
nodes.description: Abstract database adapter base classes defining the interface for connection pooling, schema statements, database statements, and transaction management shared by all concrete adapters.

nodes.label: AR PostgreSQL Adapter
nodes.description: PostgreSQL-specific adapter implementation including database statements, schema statements, column definitions, OID type mappings, and PG-specific SQL generation. The most heavily modified adapter in this segment with 14 PRs and deep dependency chains.

nodes.label: AR SQLite3 Adapter
nodes.description: SQLite3 adapter including column type handling and virtual column support. Part of a dependency chain with PostgreSQL column changes.

nodes.label: AR MySQL Adapter
nodes.description: MySQL/MariaDB-specific adapter implementation handling MySQL-specific schema operations, type mappings, and SQL dialect differences.

nodes.label: Active Support Core
nodes.description: Core Active Support utilities including message encryptor, event reporter, notifications, callbacks, inflectors, number helpers, JSON encoding/decoding, and core extensions. The second-largest module by LOC.

nodes.label: Active Support Cache
nodes.description: Caching framework including the base cache store interface, MemCacheStore, and cache entry serialization. Multiple PRs improve cache store behavior.

nodes.label: Action Text Core
nodes.description: Action Text rich text framework including the major new to_markdown conversion feature, attachment handling, content model, engine configuration, and URI scheme validation. A focal point of this segment with deep dependency chains.

nodes.label: Action Text Attachables
nodes.description: Attachable implementations for Action Text including remote images, content attachments, and missing attachable handling. Part of the markdown conversion dependency chain.

nodes.label: Action Controller
nodes.description: Action Controller implementation including metal layer (live streaming, strong parameters, rendering), block parameter improvements, and controller-level API refinements.

nodes.label: Action Dispatch
nodes.description: Request/response dispatch layer including middleware stack, error handling templates, routing, and request processing pipeline.

nodes.label: Action View
nodes.description: View rendering framework including template rendering, render parser (a significant refactoring in this segment), helpers, and view utilities.

nodes.label: Active Model
nodes.description: Model abstraction layer providing validations, attributes, serialization, dirty tracking, and naming conventions used by Active Record and standalone models.

nodes.label: Active Storage
nodes.description: File attachment framework including blob model, service backends, and integration with Action Text for rich text file attachments.

nodes.label: Active Job
nodes.description: Background job framework providing queue adapter interface, job serialization, and execution infrastructure.

nodes.label: Railties
nodes.description: Rails application bootstrap and configuration including generators (app templates, scaffold), application configuration, console commands, railtie lifecycle, and framework initialization. Covers JS package manager integration.

edges.label: PostgreSQL adapter extends abstract adapter interface
SQLite3 adapter implements abstract adapter contracts
MySQL adapter implements abstract adapter contracts
core ORM uses adapter for database operations
column definition changes propagate across adapters
cache stores use core support utilities and encryption
Action Text uses Active Support message encryptor and utilities
attachables implement Action Text attachment rendering
Action Text blob attachments use Active Storage
Active Record includes Active Model validations and attributes
railties configure Active Support settings at boot
controllers operate within the dispatch middleware stack
PG-specific features integrate with core AR query interface
controller features use Active Support callbacks and utilities
view rendering is triggered by controller render calls
remote image attachables reference Active Storage blobs
